# komodo_swarm_config (Data Source)

Reads a Docker Swarm config on a Komodo swarm by name or ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_swarm_config" "example" {
  swarm = "my-swarm"
  name  = "app-config"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `swarm` (String) The swarm name or ID to query.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The swarm config ID. One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The swarm config name. One of `name` or `id` must be set.
